mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tm_manual_consult_session ( session_no, source_type, business_type, business_key, task_type, task_id, title, questioner_user_id, questioner_name, questioner_feishu_id, service_user_id, service_display_name, service_alias, service_group, transferred_from_user_id, transferred_from_name, transferred_at, matched_by, status, closed_by_type, closed_by_name, closed_at, satisfaction_score, satisfaction_comment, unread_for_service, unread_for_questioner, last_message_preview, last_message_at ) VALUES ( #{sessionNo}, #{sourceType}, #{businessType}, #{businessKey}, #{taskType}, #{taskId}, #{title}, #{questionerUserId}, #{questionerName}, #{questionerFeishuId}, #{serviceUserId}, #{serviceDisplayName}, #{serviceAlias}, #{serviceGroup}, #{transferredFromUserId}, #{transferredFromName}, #{transferredAt}, #{matchedBy}, #{status}, #{closedByType}, #{closedByName}, #{closedAt}, #{satisfactionScore}, #{satisfactionComment}, #{unreadForService}, #{unreadForQuestioner}, #{lastMessagePreview}, #{lastMessageAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tm_manual_consult_session SET service_user_id = #{serviceUserId}, service_display_name = #{serviceDisplayName}, service_alias = #{serviceAlias}, service_group = #{serviceGroup}, transferred_from_user_id = NULL, transferred_from_name = NULL, transferred_at = NULL, matched_by = #{matchedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE tm_manual_consult_session SET service_user_id = #{serviceUserId}, service_display_name = #{serviceDisplayName}, service_alias = #{serviceAlias}, service_group = #{serviceGroup}, transferred_from_user_id = #{transferredFromUserId}, transferred_from_name = #{transferredFromName}, transferred_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, matched_by = #{matchedBy}, status = 'OPEN', closed_by_type = NULL, closed_by_name = NULL, closed_at = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{sessionId}

UPDATE tm_manual_consult_session SET status = 'CLOSED', closed_by_type = #{closedByType}, closed_by_name = #{closedByName}, closed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, satisfaction_score = #{satisfactionScore}, satisfaction_comment = #{satisfactionComment}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{sessionId}

UPDATE tm_manual_consult_session SET last_message_preview = #{preview}, last_message_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
unread_for_service = unread_for_service + 1
unread_for_questioner = unread_for_questioner + 1
WHERE id = #{sessionId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tm_manual_consult_session WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tm_manual_consult_session WHERE questioner_feishu_id = #{questionerFeishuId} ORDER BY COALESCE(last_message_at, created_at) DESC, id DESC

SELECT * FROM tm_manual_consult_session WHERE ( #{includeAll} = TRUE OR service_user_id = #{currentUserId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tm_manual_consult_participant participant WHERE participant.session_id = tm_manual_consult_session.id AND participant.participant_type = 'SERVICE' AND participant.participant_key = CONCAT('', #{currentUserId}) ) ) AND (#{status} IS NULL OR #{status} = '' OR status = #{status}) AND ( #{keyword} IS NULL OR #{keyword} = '' OR session_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR business_key LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR questioner_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR service_display_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR service_alias LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY COALESCE(last_message_at, created_at) DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tm_manual_consult_session SET unread_for_questioner = 0, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{sessionId}
UPDATE tm_manual_consult_session SET unread_for_service = 0, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{sessionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tm_manual_consult_message(session_id, sender_type, sender_key, sender_name, content_type, message_content) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{senderType}, #{senderKey}, #{senderName}, #{contentType}, #{messageContent})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tm_manual_consult_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY id ASC
